New IRE-L and NICAR-L addresses

June 1996
Journalism & Newsroom

IRE-L and NICAR-L discussion lists have moved to a new server at lists.missouri.edu, with updated email addresses for posts and subscription management.

Effective immediately, IRE-L and NICAR-L have changed addresses. They are located on lists.missouri.edu, a dedicated Unix system designed specifically to service the over 200 discussion groups run out of the University of Missouri. All posts to the lists should now be sent to: ire-l@lists.missouri.edu or to nicar-l@lists.missouri.edu

All commands for subscription changes should be sent to: distproc@lists.missouri.edu
